rationale: Criston tutored Prince Aemond Targaryen to be a skilled swordsman
Criston cut the throat of Lord Lyman Beesbury at the small council meeting
Cracked the helm of Ser Joffrey Lonmouth at the wedding tourney; the Knight of Kisses died from his injuries six days later
Served as champion to Queen Alicent Hightower; fought with her token at the tourney
Served as Hand of the King to Aegon II; crowned him and placed the crown on his head
Was her personal sworn shield as Kingsguard before turning against her during the succession crisis
Unhorsed Ser Gwayne Hightower at the tourney in 111 AC
Knocked Dark Sister from the hands of Prince Daemon Targaryen with his morningstar
Led the sack of Duskendale during the Dance of the Dragons
Carried the head of Lord Staunton back to King's Landing after the sack of Duskendale
